values.name: none
values.prose: The user agent doesn’t scale inline-level contents to fit to the line box.

values.name: grow
values.prose: The user agent scales up inline-level contents to fit to the line box.

values.name: shrink
values.prose: The user agent scales down inline-level contents to fit to the line box.

values.name: consistent
values.prose: Specifies that all lines in the container are scaled with a single scaling factor. This keyword has no effect if none is specified. If none of consistent, per-line, or per-line-all are specified, consistent is assumed.

values.name: per-line
values.prose: Specifies that each line is scaled with its own scaling factor. However, the last line of the block and lines that end in a forced break are not scaled. This keyword has no effect if none is specified.

values.name: per-line-all
values.prose: Specifies that each line is scaled with its own scaling factor, including the last line of the block and lines that end in a forced break. This keyword has no effect if none is specified.

values.name: <percentage>
values.prose: Specifies the limit of the scaling factor. If grow is specified and the value is 100% or greater, it is the maximum scaling factor. If shrink is specified and the value is between 0% and 100% inclusive, it is the minimum scaling factor. Otherwise, or if this component is omitted, there is no limit on the scaling factor.
